contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 75
- Description: Program-registration review pipeline: GAS scanner + DApp governor surface
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/332
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp_beta/pull/39
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/279
  
  Details:
  Built the governor review side of Lineage program onboarding. New GAS scanner (process_program_registration_telegram_logs.gs in the agroverse_qr_codes project) reads program-registration request events off Telegram Chat Logs using a leading-line tag match (so contribution events that merely mention the tag are ignored), and appends PENDING rows to a new Program Registrations tab on the Telegram and Submissions workbook; dedup on Telegram Update ID, hourly safety-net cron, plus a getPendingProgramRegistrations read endpoint. Deployed live as an anonymous web app (AKfycbyxwkIp6, version 11) and wired the real-time webhook env on the dao_protocol host. New DApp page program_registrations_review.html (governor-gated, read-only) lists pending requests, with a notification-bell source, menu entry, routes endpoint, and a global menu/notifications cache bump. Approve/reject action and the provisioning handler remain as the next steps.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 125.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
